missionDescription: Repossession of Class-4 Heavy Loader. Client in default. Previous recovery team lost due to unsanctioned perimeter denial devices. Bomb squad unavailable due to budget cuts. Salvage rights granted for personal effects

title: The High-G Repo
summary: A desperate pilot has rigged his docked ship with deadly traps to prevent repo. The players must navigate the booby-trapped corridor. The pilot isn't fighting back; he is floating frozen in the airlock (Suicide).
scenes: The corridor is a spiderweb of monofilament tripwires and improvised shotgun traps. At the end, the airlock is open to the void.
reward: Loot: Custom Auto-Shotgun (Found on pilot), cool revolver (found on recovery team)
